styles.log_area: QTextEdit { background-color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px; line-height: 1.5; }
styles.button: QPushButton { padding: 8px 15px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 4px; background: white; font-size: 16px; color: #1d1d1f; } QPushButton:hover { background: #f5f5f7; border-color: #d1d1d6; } QPushButton:pressed { background: #e5e5ea; padding-top: 10px; padding-left: 17px; }
styles.tab_widget: QTabWidget::pane { border: none; background: white; } QTabBar { alignment: left; } QTabBar::tab { background: #f2f2f7; padding: 8px 20px; border-top-left-radius: 4px; border-top-right-radius: 4px; margin-right: 2px; color: #86868b; font-size: 16px; min-width: 80px; } QTabBar::tab:selected { background: white; color: #1d1d1f; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-bottom: none; font-weight: bold; }
styles.sheet_tabs: QTabWidget::pane { border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; } QTabBar { alignment: left; } QTabBar::tab { background: #f2f2f7; padding: 6px 15px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-bottom: none; border-top-left-radius: 4px; border-top-right-radius: 4px; margin-right: 2px; color: #86868b; } QTabBar::tab:selected { background: white; color: #1d1d1f; font-weight: bold; }
styles.input_field: QLineEdit, QComboBox, QSpinBox { border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 4px; padding: 5px; }
styles.menu_bar: QMenuBar { background-color: #ffffff; border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0; padding: 4px; font-size: 16px; } QMenuBar::item { padding: 6px 15px; background: transparent; border-radius: 4px; } QMenuBar::item:selected { background: #f0f0f0; } QMenu { background-color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; font-size: 16px; } QMenu::item { padding: 8px 30px 8px 25px; } QMenu::item:selected { background-color: #007aff; color: white; }

styles.log_area: QTextEdit { background-color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px; line-height: 1.5; }
